/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zlynx.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/zlynx.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlynx.dir/coroutime/fiber.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlynx.dir/coroutime/scheduler.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlynx.dir/coroutime/timer.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlynx.dir/sync/sem.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlynx.dir/sync/thread.cc.o -o zlynx  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/zlynx/zlynx/build/zlog zlog/libzlog_shared.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0
